title: Heckington Fen Solar Park: development consent order Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Ecotricity (Heck Fen Solar) Limited for the construction, operation and decommissioning of a ground mounted solar generating facility with a total capacity exceeding 50 megawatts (MW) together with an energy storage facility (with an estimated storage capacity of 200-400 MW), below ground grid connection to, and extension at, the National Grid Bicker Fen substation.  Date of decision  24 January 2025  Company / location   Ecotricity (Heck Fen Solar) LimitedLincolnshire   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  At least 50 MW – there is no maximum limit on generating capacity.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
